message.content:
In the codebase at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3, find and read:

1. The main CSS file that defines CSS custom properties / variables (look for :root or [data-theme] selectors with --bg, --text, --accent, --border variables). Search in client/src for files like index.css, App.css, globals.css, theme.css, variables.css etc.
2. The existing comment section CSS (comments.css or similar) to understand the established comment styling patterns
3. Any glass morphism or card styling patterns used elsewhere

Return the FULL contents of the CSS variable definitions (both light and dark themes) and the comment section styles.

content.text: I'll help you find and read the CSS files that define custom properties and comment styling. Let me search for these files.

input.description: List CSS files in client/src directory

content.text: Good! I found the files. Let me read the main CSS files that likely contain the CSS custom properties and the comments styling.
Perfect! Now let me search for any additional glass morphism or card styling patterns in other CSS files to provide you with a complete picture.
Let me read a couple of files that use glass morphism patterns to get more context:
